rule_value: only ui/jansa-connected.html is accepted
why_it_matters: app refuses to start if any other UI variant is provided.

rule_value: 'raw'
why_it_matters: Default value if orchestrator is bypassed. The orchestrator overrides to 'flat' at runtime. Calling pipeline.runner directly takes the raw path silently.

rule_value: resolve FINAL_GF from latest COMPLETED non-stale run; fallback to run_0
why_it_matters: If user does not provide a GF in the Executer page, the orchestrator inherits from history.

rule_value: output/_orchestrator_disabled/<run_mode_lower>/...
why_it_matters: In modes where consultant ingestion is disabled (GED_ONLY, GED_REPORT without reports_dir), output paths get redirected to a disabled root so files don't poison the real output/.

rule_value: 3 attempts (immediate, +1s, +2s)
why_it_matters: Robust to transient locks on output/GF_TEAM_VERSION.xlsx (Excel hold etc.).

rule_value: FULL and GED_REPORT raise RuntimeError after 3 attempts; other modes warn-only
why_it_matters: Production modes guarantee a team file or fail loudly.

rule_value: 1) ctx.GF_FILE on disk; 2) latest GF_TEAM_VERSION artifact; 3) latest FINAL_GF artifact; 4) skip/fail
why_it_matters: Allows the team builder to function across runs with or without a fresh OGF.

rule_value: raw GED rebuild path triggered when FLAT_GED artifact missing; logs '[LEGACY_RAW_FALLBACK]'
why_it_matters: Legacy path; should not be hit in healthy runs but kept as safety net.

rule_value: module-level _cached_context + _cached_run_number; cleared by clear_cache() after pipeline run completion
why_it_matters: Avoids re-loading the run context for every UI call.

rule_value: daemon thread loads RunContext on Api construction; api.get_*_for_ui calls wait via _cache_ready.Event
why_it_matters: Smooths out first-paint latency.

rule_value: retry delays (0.0, 0.2, 0.5)s + immutable URI fallback ('file:...?mode=ro&immutable=1')
why_it_matters: Tolerates pipeline writers concurrently using the DB.
Bridge degrades to placeholder data after 5s without window.pywebview.api.

rule_value: _loadGen counter increments per refresh; older responses are discarded
why_it_matters: Race-condition guard during Focus toggle / stale-slider changes.

rule_value: setDataVersion(v=>v+1) after each refreshForFocus
why_it_matters: Forces re-render of children that rely on window globals.

rule_value: fiche call uses consultant.canonical_name OR consultant.name
why_it_matters: Resolves SOCOTEC, AVLS, etc. UI tokens to canonical backend names via reporting.consultant_fiche.resolve_consultant_name.

rule_value: default {VSO, VAO, REF}; Bureau de Contrôle {FAV, SUS, DEF}; MOEX SAS {VSO, VAO, REF}
why_it_matters: Determines which labels appear in fiche header and bloc3.

rule_value: _focus_priority is 1..5 (P1 overdue -> P5 ok)
why_it_matters: Drives priority_queue ordering and OVERVIEW.focus.p* counters.

rule_value: if output/chain_onion/ missing or scores empty, return (None, 0)
why_it_matters: Focus mode silently degrades to ownership-only when chain_onion outputs are absent.

rule_value: any non-None/non-zero PJ value -> flag=1
why_it_matters: Convention used by the builder.

rule_value: Mapping.xlsx is in input/ and exposed in Executer UI but app.Api.run_pipeline_async does not pass it
why_it_matters: Either remove the picker or wire it through. UI labels it 'informatif - non transmis au backend'.

rule_value: reads output/intermediate/FLAT_GED.xlsx + DEBUG_TRACE.csv + data/report_memory.db; writes output/chain_onion/*
why_it_matters: Not coupled to run_number - its inputs come from the most recent intermediate, not from a registered run artifact.

rule_value: Steps 04..14 (source_loader=04, family_grouper=05, chain_builder=06, chain_classifier=07, chain_metrics=08, onion_engine=09, onion_scoring=10, narrative_engine=11, exporter=12, query_hooks=13, validation_harness=14)
why_it_matters: Used in logs and docs.

rule_value: doc_id is a fresh UUID per loader call; SESSION-SCOPED
why_it_matters: Must NOT be persisted to chain output CSVs or used cross-run.

rule_value: FAMILY_KEY=str(numero); VERSION_KEY=numero+'_'+indice; INSTANCE_KEY=version_key+'_'+submission_instance_id
why_it_matters: Stable cross-run keys for chain analysis.

rule_value: sha256 of every registered artifact
why_it_matters: Integrity contract for run replay / parity checks.

rule_value: 'Tableau de suivi de visa DD_MM_YYYY.xlsx' under OUTPUT_DIR; date from ctx.data_date or today
why_it_matters: Dated copy used for distribution.

rule_value: 'Drilldown_<consultant>_<filter>_DDMMYYYY.xlsx' under OUTPUT_DIR
why_it_matters: Sanitised consultant + filter slugs.

rule_value: subprocess.Popen('explorer /select,...'); falls back to opening parent folder if file missing
why_it_matters: Windows-specific UX.

rule_value: 'SOCOTEC' -> 'Bureau de Contrôle'
why_it_matters: Allows UI tokens to use either form.

rule_value: 'GEMO' -> 'Maître d'Oeuvre EXE'
why_it_matters: Allows UI to display either token.
